summary: Iteration 30 — 15/15 tests pass for anular_factura_compra feature (guard logic, post_action_sync CASO 5, alegra mock DELETE, system prompt keywords, stats isolation, action handler registration).
critical_code_review_comments: TEST 1: Guard correctly finds motos with estado=Vendida/Entregada linked to a bill and raises ValueError with 'No se puede anular' ✅
TEST 2: Guard returns 0 blocked motos when moto is Disponible → allows proceeding ✅
TEST 3a: post_action_sync CASO 5 updates linked motos to estado=Anulada ✅
TEST 3b: post_action_sync CASO 5 inserts factura.compra.anulada event in roddos_events ✅

TEST 4: alegra_service._mock('bills/123', 'DELETE') returns {id:'123', status:'void'} ✅ — NOTE: tested via _mock() directly because production credentials have is_demo_mode=False; mock path unreachable in production without demo mode
TEST 5: All system prompt keywords present — referencia, VIN:, NEGRO MATE, anular_factura_compra, ANULACIÓN, 'NUNCA cantidad > 1 con un solo chasis', Pendiente datos ✅

TEST 6: GET /api/inventario/stats returns disponibles count that correctly excludes Anulada motos ✅ — NOTE: stats endpoint doesn't return an 'anuladas' field; Anulada motos are silently excluded (not explicitly counted). Consider adding 'anuladas' field for frontend visibility.
TEST 7: Special case handler for anular_factura_compra is registered BEFORE ACTION_MAP check in ai_chat.py ✅
seed_data_creation: Test motos/events inserted and cleaned up per test. No permanent data left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 tests for anular_factura_compra pass. Guard in ai_chat.py (line 1552) blocks Vendida/Entregada motos. post_action_sync CASO 5 (line 501) sets Anulada + creates event. alegra _mock DELETE bills/{id} returns {id, status:'void'} correctly. Stats endpoint does NOT expose an 'anuladas' counter — minor gap. System prompt has all required keywords.
